title: Leaf Piles
description: Replaces leaf litter block model to use layers, similarly to snow layers
body:
Changes the leaf litter model to become layered rather than using corners. 

![Leaf piles underneath tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LTQbvnMs/images/428e9ef4c639a998baea0c0c5bc22d13fbd22104.png)
